headline: Open-weight coding models and local image generators headlined the window as diffusion evaluation and agent learning advanced.
body: Open-weight, locally runnable tooling led the day: GLM-5.2 surfaced as a free stealth coding model through OpenCode with fast inference and high request limits, and Krea 2 arrived as an uncensored local image generator with ComfyUI and LoRA fine-tuning support. On the research side, DiffusionBench introduced a holistic evaluation framework for generative diffusion transformers, while text-to-image generation, classifier guidance, and noise prediction broke out as techniques. Agent capability expanded as Hermes Agent gained the ability to learn from arbitrary sources, and memory-pipeline momentum tracked reported surges at Micron and SK Hynix on high bandwidth memory demand. Counterweighting the activity, tech stocks slumped amid renewed AI bubble concerns.

cited_items.title: GLM 5.2 FULLY FREE & FAST CODER: This AI Coder is CRAZY & WORKS!
New top local AI image generator is here! Already uncensored
DiffusionBench: Towards Holistic Evaluation of Generative Diffusion Transformers
Hermes Agent can now /learn from anything
AI Memory Boom: Micron & SK Hynix Surge! Huge Growth Ahead! #shorts
Tech stocks slump as AI bubble fears loom
